embed.title: !poracle
embed.description: Register yourself with the bot, or re-enable tracking after you've been disabled.

fields.name: First-time registration
fields.value:
Run `{{prefix}}poracle` in a designated registration channel (ask your admin which channel that is). The bot will DM you a welcome message with a starter command list.

On Telegram, run it in the group your admin has configured for registration — not in a direct message.

fields.name: Re-enable after admin disable
fields.value: If you've been disabled (you'll have seen a message about lost roles, or too many rate-limit breaches), re-run `{{prefix}}poracle` to reactivate.

fields.name: Next steps after registering
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}location <address or lat,lon>` — set your location
`{{prefix}}track pikachu iv:90-100 d:1000` — first tracking rule
`{{prefix}}help track` — full filter guide
